sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 시놉시스는 2025 회계연도 매출 70억 5,400만 달러를 기록하며 견고한 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025 회계연도 연간 매출은 70억 5,400만 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.
4분기 매출은 22억 5,500만 달러로 가이던스 중간값을 상회하는 성과를 거두었습니다.

businessChanges.text: Ansys 인수를 통해 실리콘에서 시스템까지 아우르는 엔지니어링 솔루션 리더로서의 입지를 강화했습니다.
4분기 중 Ansys는 6억 6,770만 달러의 매출을 기여하며 사업 포트폴리오 확장에 기여했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025 회계연도 연간 매출은 전년 대비 약 15% 증가한 70억 5,400만 달러를 기록했습니다.
4분기 GAAP 기준 순이익은 4억 4,870만 달러(주당 2.39달러)로 전년 동기 대비 증가했습니다.
2026 회계연도 연간 매출 가이던스 중간값은 96억 1,000만 달러로 제시되었습니다.

watchItems.text: 2026 회계연도 가이던스에 포함된 Ansys 매출 29억 달러의 통합 과정과 운영 효율성 개선 여부를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 d29055dex991.htm EX-99.1 EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 PRESS RELEASE INVESTOR CONTACT: Tushar Jain Synopsys, Inc. 650-584-4289 Synopsys-ir@synopsys.com EDITORIAL CONTACT: Cara Walker Synopsys, Inc. 650-584-5000 corp-pr@synopsys.com Synopsys Posts Financial Results for Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Results Summary • Record full-year 2025 revenue of $7.054 billion. Fourth-quarter revenue of $2.255 billion, exceeding midpoint of guidance. • Full-year and fourth-quarter non-GAAP earnings per diluted share (EPS) exceeded guidance. • Expecting fiscal year 2026 revenue of $9.610 billion at mid-point, including $2.9 billion of expected Ansys revenue and reflecting the impact of approximately $110 million of divested Optical Solution  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.054 billion = 70억 5,400만 달러; $2.255 billion = 22억 5,500만 달러; $9.610 billion = 96억 1,000만 달러; $2.9 billion = 29억 달러; $110 million = 1억 1,000만 달러; $7.054 = 7.054달러; $2.255 = 2.255달러; $9.610 = 9.610달러; $110 = 110달러; $2.9 = 2.9달러.

nd fiscal year 2025. Revenue for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025 was $2.255 billion, compared to $1.636 billion for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2024. Ansys contributed $667.7 million in revenue for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025. Revenue for fiscal year 2025 was $7.054 billion, an increase of approximately 15% from $6.127 billion in fiscal year 2024. Ansys contributed $756.6 million in revenue for fiscal year 2025. “The Synopsys team delivered a solid finish to a year that redefined our company as the leader in engineering solutions from silicon to systems,” said Sassine Ghazi, president and CEO of Synop  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.255 billion = 22억 5,500만 달러; $1.636 billion = 16억 3,600만 달러; $667.7 million = 6억 6,770만 달러; $7.054 billion = 70억 5,400만 달러; $6.127 billion = 61억 2,700만 달러; $756.6 million = 7억 5,660만 달러; $11.4 billion = 114억 달러; $2.255 = 2.255달러; $667.7 = 667.7달러; $1.636 = 1.636달러; $7.054 = 7.054달러; $6.127 = 6.127달러; $756.6 = 756.6달러; $11.4 = 11.4달러.

he resilience of business,” said Shelagh Glaser, CFO of Synopsys. “We expect to set another revenue record in 2026 while fully integrating Ansys, driving further operational efficiency, and capitalizing on our expanded opportunity.” 1 GAAP Results On a U.S. generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP) basis, net income for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025 was $448.7 million, or $2.39 per diluted share, compared to $279.3 million, or $1.79 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2024. GAAP net income for fiscal year 2025 was $1.336 billion, or $8.07 per diluted share, compared to $1.442 billion, or   Normalized numeric aliases: $448.7 million = 4억 4,870만 달러; $279.3 million = 2억 7,930만 달러; $1.336 billion = 13억 3,600만 달러; $1.442 billion = 14억 4,200만 달러; $543.1 million = 5억 4,310만 달러; $529.9 million = 5억 2,990만 달러; $448.7 = 448.7달러; $2.39 = 2.39달러; $1.79 = 1.79달러; $543.1 = 543.1달러; $1.442 = 1.442달러; $9.25 = 9.25달러; $2.90 = 2.90달러; $529.9 = 529.9달러; $3.40 = 3.40달러.
